text.title: structured-output-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for structured-output-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Declaring Optional[X] without a default value (e.g., field: Optional[str]).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Optional without a default still makes the field required at Pydantic instantiation, causing ValidationError on LLM output that omits the field. Always use Optional[X] = None or Field(default=None).
